cases.name: Registration, login, rate limit and other-device logout

business: Registration verifies email and login returns a token; rate limit rejects excess attempts; other-device logout invalidates old token.
database: Member, login history and device records match the final authentication state.
event: Security/login audit records contain success, failure, rate-limit and device-revoke events without secrets.

cases.name: Product SKU reservation and concurrent last item

business: Exactly one of the concurrent buyers can reserve the final SKU.
database: SPU/SKU stock and lock_stock preserve stock >= lock_stock >= 0.
event: Exactly one inventory reservation ledger/outbox fact is committed for the winning request.

cases.name: Order discount and payment state matrix

business: Order uses actual coupon discount and exposes PROCESSING/UNKNOWN/PAID/FAILED without inventing success.
database: Order, coupon actual_discount_amount and payment record agree with the sandbox provider result.
event: Verified callback evidence and payment Outbox facts are durable and idempotent.

cases.name: Close order and late payment race

business: Close and late sandbox payment converge to a documented manual/auto-refund outcome.
database: Order terminal state, payment state and late_payment_case are mutually consistent.
event: Close, late callback and compensation events retain ordering and idempotency keys.

cases.name: Full and partial shipment, delivery and auto receive

business: Only fulfillable quantity ships; auto receive occurs only after all non-refunded quantity is delivered.
database: Shipment items, order items and order status preserve fulfillment/refund quantity invariants.
event: Duplicate/out-of-order logistics callbacks produce one ordered logistics audit timeline.

cases.name: Partial after-sale, refund unknown and manual review

business: Partial refund absorbs final rounding tail and UNKNOWN remains unresolved until query/review.
database: Return quantities, refund record, order item refunded amount and inventory restoration agree.
event: Refund request, provider query, retry/manual decision and inventory ledger are auditable.

cases.name: Duplicate payment, refund and logistics callbacks

business: Duplicate callbacks and request IDs return the original outcome without repeating side effects.
database: Unique keys and CAS transitions leave one payment/refund/logistics fact.
event: Duplicates are retained as evidence or deduplicated with an auditable reason; no duplicate ledger delta occurs.

cases.name: Cross-tenant order, Action, RAG, cache and audit isolation

business: Tenant A receives not-found/forbidden for every Tenant B resource and no existence oracle.
database: Tenant predicates prevent cross-tenant order, Action and audit rows from being returned or mutated.
event: Denied accesses are security-audited under trusted token-derived tenant/user identity without leaking payloads.

business: CSRF/XSS/SQLi/unauthorized/replay/oversized upload attempts are rejected with stable public errors.
database: Rejected requests create no unauthorized business mutation and nonce/upload limits remain consistent.
event: Security audit records sanitized actor, source, rule and trace without secrets or malicious raw content.

cases.name: MySQL, Redis, LLM and Milvus outage recovery

business: Reads degrade explicitly, writes fail closed and service recovers without fabricated success.
database: Recovery preserves orders, payments, refunds, inventory, Actions and knowledge versions.
event: Lease takeover/fencing produces one final execution and outage/recovery alerts plus audit are present.
